notes.en: Tyrosine phosphatase inhibitor. Must activate: pH 10, boil, cool, readjust. Repeat until stable and colorless. Use 1 mM final.
notes.zh: 酪氨酸磷酸酶抑制剂。需活化：调 pH 10，煮沸，冷却，再调 pH。重复至溶液稳定无色。终浓度 1 mM。

storage.notes: Aliquot; add fresh to lysis buffers

usage.en: Sodium orthovanadate phosphatase inhibitor stock for preserving phosphorylation in cell lysates.
usage.zh: 正钒酸钠磷酸酶抑制剂母液，用于保护细胞裂解液中的磷酸化状态。
